Hero.headline: Your products deserve better than a phone photo on the floor
Hero.subheading: AI Studio transforms raw product photos into professional, studio-quality scenes in seconds. No photography studio needed.

HowItWorks.title: How It Works
HowItWorks.subheading: From raw photo to studio-grade in 5 simple steps
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Start a new workspace for your product line.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Upload up to 5 raw product photos.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Select product type and desired scene style.
HowItWorks.step4Desc: Optionally describe your vision in AR or EN.
HowItWorks.step5Desc: Get professional images ready for your store.

Slider.title: See the difference yourself
Slider.mafrareshAfter: ✨ Fully made bed in a warm lifestyle scene

Features.title: Built for E-commerce Sellers
Features.feat1Desc: AI only changes the background and lighting, never the product itself.
Features.feat2Desc: Optimized models for Solid objects, Wearables, and Mafraresh.
Features.feat3Desc: Choose beautiful presets or pick a custom color background.
Features.feat4Desc: Describe your exact vision in Arabic or English.
Features.feat5Desc: Not happy with one image? Regenerate just that one.
Features.feat6Desc: Pay only for what you generate, zero waste.

Testimonials.title: Loved by sellers everywhere
Testimonials.t1Quote: AI Studio saved me thousands of Riyals. I just take a picture on my desk and it looks like a high-end luxury ad.
Testimonials.t2Quote: I was struggling with lighting for my clothing line. Now I upload the folded items and get perfect flat-lays.
Testimonials.t3Quote: For Mafraresh, it's a game changer. Putting the sheets on a real bed took hours. AI Studio does it in seconds.
Testimonials.t4Quote: The Nature presets are stunning. My feed looks incredibly professional and my conversion rate doubled.
Testimonials.t5Quote: Very accurate! It kept all the intricate details of my watches while placing them on beautiful marble blocks.
Testimonials.t6Quote: I love the Arabic prompt feature. I can describe exactly the vibe I want in my native language and the AI understands.
